title: Beam Global Deploys EV ARC Systems to New York Development
text: Beam Global sold ten EV ARC off-grid EV charging systems to a New York residential development addressing the critical challenge of deploying EV charging in multi-unit housing. Traditional grid-connected charging infrastructure is often infeasible in residential developments due to utility permitting delays and electrical infrastructure limitations. Beam Global's EV ARC provides off-grid, solar-powered charging eliminating permitting delays and construction requirements while providing residents with sustainable EV charging capability. The 10-unit deployment demonstrates strong market demand from residential developers seeking to add EV charging amenities without prolonged construction timelines. Multiple unit deployments generate significant revenue and establish Beam as preferred EV charging solution for residential markets. This application expands Beam Global's addressable market beyond municipal and federal government customers to include commercial real estate and residential development sectors.
